dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses time series momentum over 3-12 month horizon. Implemented using 'returns' indicator which captures recent price performance. Entry long when returns > 0, entry short when returns < 0. Exit conditions reverse the entry signal (momentum reversal). Holding period capped at 252 trading days (~12 months). THRESHOLD_NEEDED values for lookback_period, position_size_pct not specified in source—defaults applied: returns calculated over full lookback window, position sizing to be configured separately. Regime 'TRENDING' retained from signal specification.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses time series momentum over 3-12 month horizon. Implemented using 'returns' indicator which captures recent price performance. Entry long when returns > 0, entry short when returns < 0. Exit conditions reverse the entry signal (momentum reversal). Holding period capped at 252 trading days (~12 months). THRESHOLD_NEEDED values for lookback_period, position_size_pct not specified in source—defaults applied: returns calculated over full lookback window, position sizing to be configured separately. Regime 'TRENDING' retained from signal specification.

source_rule_text: Buy instruments with positive recent returns and sell instruments with negative recent returns over a 3- to 12-month time horizon to capture time series momentum.
